era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- underground persistence, lyrical density, self-release philosophy. E=6 streak continues (161-168). Thirty-second degree in hip-hop era (134-168). v1.49.305.

location.formative: Seattle underground hip-hop scene. Local venues, community networks, Bandcamp/SoundCloud distribution.
location.career: Khingz. Underground hip-hop artist. Dense lyrical style. Self-released. No label intermediary.

members.name: Khingz
members.note: Seattle underground. Dense lyrical style. Multi-syllabic rhyme schemes. Self-released everything.

theory_nodes.concept: Underground persistence -- years of sustained output in the underground without commercial compromise. Self-released everything. The deep bench of Seattle hip-hop.
examples: Self-released projects over years. No label. No distributor.
Deep bench of Seattle hip-hop demonstrated.
E=6 streak (161-168) sustained by underground depth.

theory_nodes.concept: Lyrical density -- multi-syllabic rhyme schemes, internal rhymes, layered wordplay. Dense bars that reward multiple listens. Technical proficiency as primary measure.
examples: Multi-syllabic rhyme schemes with internal rhymes.
Content: street-level observation, personal narrative, lyrical flexing.
Production serves the lyrics -- hard-hitting but leaving space.
theory_nodes.description: Lyrical density. Technical craft. Dense bars.

theory_nodes.concept: Self-release as philosophy -- not a stepping stone to a label deal but the philosophy itself. No intermediary shapes the music. Art goes directly from creator to listener.
examples: No A&R. No marketing team. No brand definition.
Contrasts with Ryan Lewis independent-but-mainstream model (160).

cross_references.relationship: CONSECUTIVE UNDERGROUND! Both below the surface. E=6 streak building.
VISIBILITY CONTRAST! Lewis at #1 Billboard (E=5). Khingz in deepest underground (E=6). Different layers.
EXPERIMENTAL VS RAW! Shabazz pushes formal boundaries. Khingz pushes lyrical density. Both E=6.
COMMUNITY TO UNDERGROUND! Blue Scholars established community template. Khingz operates beneath -- the current that feeds the scene.
